## v0.44.0

### 🛑 Breaking changes 🛑

- `prometheusexporter`: Automatically rename metrics with units to follow Prometheus naming convention (#8950)

### 💡 Enhancements 💡

- `filterprocessor`: Ability to filter `Spans` (#6341)
